---
title: "Argo NetCDF file format checker updated"
date: "2026-06-08"
categories: [infra]
image: "/assets/images/ArgoNetCDFFormat.png"
---
The Argo NetCDF files format checker was updated on June 8th, 2026.  
More information on [https://github.com/OneArgo/ArgoFormatChecker/releases/tag/v3.0.4](https://github.com/OneArgo/ArgoFormatChecker/releases/tag/v3.0.4){target="_blank"}
